name: helios
description: Helios — Total Cost & Turnaround Management Platform (monorepo)

scripts.dev: pnpm types:build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @helios/api start:dev" "pnpm --filter @helios/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @helios/api exec prisma generate && pnpm types:build && pnpm --filter @helios/api build && pnpm --filter @helios/web build
